summary: Iteration 93: Testing ElevenLabs voice narration integration and project management improvements. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified DirectedStudio component with new features: delete project button on hover, resume button for error projects, voice narration section with 24-voice selector, and Generate Narration button.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML nesting warning: button inside button (delete button inside project button)

action_items: Consider refactoring delete button to avoid button-inside-button HTML nesting (cosmetic issue, not blocking)
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: GET /api/studio/voices correctly returns 24 ElevenLabs voices with id, name, gender, accent, style fields
studio.py: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-narration correctly validates scenes exist (returns 400 if no scenes)
studio.py: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/narrations returns narrations, narration_status, voice_config
studio.py: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status now includes narrations, narration_status, voice_config fields
studio.py: DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id} correctly removes project and returns 404 on subsequent access
DirectedStudio.jsx: Delete button appears on project hover with data-testid='delete-project-{id}'
DirectedStudio.jsx: Resume button appears for error projects with data-testid='resume-project-{id}'
DirectedStudio.jsx: Voice narration section in Step 2 with voice selector (24 voices) and Generate Narration button
DirectedStudio.jsx: loadProjects() function replaces setPastProjects (bug fix verified)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects for API testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ElevenLabs narration integration working. Voice selector has 24 voices. Narration generation runs in background thread. To test narration: need a project with scenes (use screenwriter chat first). The component auto-resumes in-progress productions. Project list shows 39 projects with various statuses. Delete and resume buttons appear on hover.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/voices: PASS - Returns 24 voices with required fields
backend_api_tests.DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id}: PASS - Deletes project, returns 404 on subsequent access
backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status: PASS - Returns status with narrations, narration_status, voice_config

frontend_ui_tests.Delete project button: PASS - Visible on hover with data-testid='delete-project-{id}'
frontend_ui_tests.Resume project button: PASS - Visible for error projects with data-testid='resume-project-{id}'
frontend_ui_tests.Step navigation: PASS - 5 step buttons (Roteiro, Personagens, Produção, Resultado)
